mapper.select: SELECT p.postId, p.boardId, p.parentPostId, p.depth, p.title, p.content, p.category, p.tags, p.isPinned, p.isSecret, p.isAnonymous, p.viewCount, p.likeCount, p.commentCount, p.attachCount, p.targetDeptId, p.useYn, p.createdUser, p.createdDate, p.updateUser, p.updatedDate, m.boardName, CASE WHEN l.likeId IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS isLiked FROM board_post p LEFT JOIN board_master m ON p.boardId = m.boardId LEFT JOIN board_like l ON l.targetType = 'POST' AND l.targetId = p.postId AND l.createdUser = #{currentUser} WHERE p.postId = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_post (postId, boardId, parentPostId, depth, title, content, category, tags, isPinned, isSecret, isAnonymous, targetDeptId, useYn, createdUser, updateUser) VALUES (#{postId}, #{boardId}, #{parentPostId}, #{depth}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{tags}, #{isPinned}, #{isSecret}, #{isAnonymous}, #{targetDeptId}, #{useYn}, #{createdUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update: UPDATE board_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, tags = #{tags}, isPinned = #{isPinned}, isSecret = #{isSecret}, isAnonymous = #{isAnonymous}, targetDeptId = #{targetDeptId}, useYn = #{useYn}, updateUser = #{updateUser}, updatedDate = NOW() WHERE postId = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_post WHERE postId = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE board_post SET viewCount = viewCount + 1 WHERE postId = #{postId}
UPDATE board_post SET likeCount = likeCount + 1 WHERE postId = #{postId}
UPDATE board_post SET likeCount = GREATEST(likeCount - 1, 0) WHERE postId = #{postId}
UPDATE board_post SET commentCount = commentCount + 1 WHERE postId = #{postId}
UPDATE board_post SET commentCount = GREATEST(commentCount - 1, 0) WHERE postId = #{postId}
UPDATE board_post SET attachCount = attachCount + 1 WHERE postId = #{postId}
UPDATE board_post SET attachCount = GREATEST(attachCount - 1, 0) WHERE postId = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT('POST', LPAD( COALESCE(CAST(SUBSTRING(MAX(postId), 5) AS UNSIGNED), 0) + 1, 7, '0' )) AS nextPostId FROM board_post WHERE postId REGEXP '^POST[0-9]+$'
